markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss a proposed engineering team restructure and gather feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proposed Restructure:** A new model assigns junior engineers to Engagement Managers (EMs) for client accounts. Senior engineers (Marcus, Nico) will provide high-level support, code review, and lead complex projects.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [**New Kirkland Role:** Kirkland is proposed as Team Lead for the junior engineers. This leverages his client-facing skills and frees him from deep coding while accommodating personal commitments.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [**Hiring Strategy:** The new `output.space.dev` framework will be open-sourced. Take-home assignments using it will serve as a key filter for hiring junior engineers with strong automation and content skills.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [**Workflow Efficiency:** Marcus's workflow (using CloudCode for planning, CodeX for execution) is highly efficient. The `FlowCli Debug` tool is also a powerful asset for analyzing agent activity and HTTP requests.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

## Topics

### Current Challenges

  - [**Client Feedback Delays:** Slow feedback stalls tasks and risks clients abandoning the platform for manual workarounds.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [**Task Management:** The current system is effective for organizing meetings but less so for driving asynchronous task completion.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [**Senior Engineer Availability:**](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Kirkland:** High client-facing value but often unavailable for deep coding due to personal matters.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
      - [**Nico:** Strong technically but focused on large projects, leading to minor bugs in daily work.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)

### Proposed Team Restructure

  - [**Goal:** Create a scalable engineering team by leveraging diverse skill sets.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [**New Roles & Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**Engagement Managers (EMs):** Client-facing relationship owners (7–8 accounts each).](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**Junior Engineers:** Assigned to EMs; focus on automation and content.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
          - [**Profile:** Strong content/SEO background, some coding experience (e.g., Next.js, Vercel).](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Senior Engineers (Marcus, Nico):**](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
          - [High-level technical support and architectural decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
          - [Code review for junior engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
          - [Lead complex projects (e.g., Zapier, Lovell API agent) for 1–2 months, then hand off to a junior engineer.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Kirkland (Proposed Team Lead):**](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
          - [Coordinate junior engineers and manage their onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
          - [Act as a technical liaison for sales and client planning.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
      - [**Léo Stefan (Chief of Staff Engineer):**](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
          - [Full-stack engineer with a QA background.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
          - [Can support Kirkland with recruiting and meeting attendance.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)

### Hiring & Onboarding

  - [**Hiring Funnel:**](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
      - [The new `output.space.dev` framework will be open-sourced.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
      - [Take-home assignments using the framework will be the primary technical filter.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [**Interview Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Marcus will join the technical interview panel to review take-home assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**Candidate Profile:** A current candidate (technical SEO PM at UOL) fits the ideal profile, having built an AI automation agency with Zapier and Make.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Developer Workflow & Tools

  - [**Marcus's Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [Uses CloudCode for initial planning, then CodeX to refine the plan and execute the task.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [Manages multiple parallel tasks by instructing the AI to avoid files used in other sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [**`FlowCli Debug` Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
      - [A powerful internal tool for analyzing agent activity, HTTP requests, and costs.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
      - [Daniel proposes integrating it into the public `output.space.dev` framework.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Daniel:** Announce Kirkland's new Team Lead role.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [**Daniel:** Add Marcus to the technical interview panel for new engineering candidates.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Marcus:** Provide feedback on the `output.space.dev` framework's user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [**Marcus:** DM Daniel privately about any issues with Clint.](https://fathom.video/share/Am9z9tfzh1unsvKZuQ2Ev2GyTMzUPvhy?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
